query: Review this AI feature PR. It adds a GPT-4o call that takes user input and returns a recommended product from our catalog.
expected_behavior: Applies the AI Production Checklist: Evals, Prompts, Telemetry, Security
Checks whether the system prompt is version-controlled (not hardcoded in the function)
Checks whether there are evals covering at least the hallucination and prompt injection cases
Checks whether the LLM output is validated before being used as data (output parser)
Classifies any missing eval coverage as Verification Quality (P1) and any missing prompt injection defense as Runtime Safety (P0 or P1)
